dismissalComment.html: another run out in the final over, Marsh is gone for 96 looking for that second run and Jurel's quick glove work finishes his innings. Low full toss slammed down to long off, Jaiswal is quick with his pick up, flat throw to the keeper's end and dislodges top of off with a direct hit

dismissalText.commentary: Josh Inglis b Yash Raj Punja 60 (29b 7x4 3x6 44m) SR: 206.89

dismissalComment.html: That's one way to come back! Punja does the brave thing: lobs this up fuuuull, and just deceives Inglis through the air. Batter was on one knee and wanted to swipe it over deep midwicket. But he just gets deceived in the air and loses his stumps. Punja plays it cool, hardly a reaction. Narine writ all over that non-celebration

dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran c Ferreira b Yash Raj Punja 16 (11b 0x4 2x6 22m) SR: 145.45

dismissalComment.html: and Yash Raj delivers again! Decent pace at 94.8kmh, turning away again from good length and Pooran doesn't quite middle it while going down town and this time Ferreira does well to hold on over his head. Sigh of relief for him
